warnings: PATTERN RECLASSIFIED (t4, 2026-07-08 taxonomy): same reasoning as sibling R1 (_หน้า14_eave_r1.json) -- reclassified from t3's 'section' to 'side_profile' since this detail has no rebar/steel spec, only roofing/fascia material and dimension callouts on a cross-section cut through the roof edge.
This is eave/fascia detail R2, sibling to R1 on the same sheet A-12.

The circled letter 'E' at the bottom of this detail does NOT match any letter in the building's main gridline set (D, C, B, A) or the dummy-grid set in the master gridline file (mk_test/t4/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json) -- this strongly suggests 'E' is a generic local reference/section letter for this detail drawing only, not a building gridline. Not added to the grid master; no grid_source claimed for this file (consistent with t3's same conclusion).

Independent read done first, then cross-checked against t3's หน้า14_eave_r2.json: matches on all material callouts, the 1.50 m overhang, and the 'E is not a real grid letter' conclusion. The small '0.30' offset dimension near the post read clearly on this independent pass as well; its exact geometric meaning (offset from what reference) remains uncertain, consistent with t3.
Sibling detail R1 is in _หน้า14_eave_r1.json.
